title: Beer totem
description: This is a simple resource pack that replaces the totem with a beer mug
body:
## Now your drink will always be with you. This resource pack exchanges your totem for a mug of beer.
![totem in hand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f93dd4edd7cd1f1bb6fd3e7288ee92c78ebe240c.png)
In order for the totem to appear, you need to change it in the anvil “Beer”.
